summary: ESNI Management | Rules | Display All rules with correct columns
gherkin:
When the user navigate to "ESNI Management" page by clicking ESNI Management tab on the home page or from the side bar
Then the user should land on the ESNI Management "Media ID" page by default
When the user clicks on the "Rules" tab from the top header
And https://sop-qa.mlb.com/esni/rules
!xray-attachment://6bf3d6d1-5a19-4150-b759-7fddf9637fad|width=1483,height=1386!
Then the user should see the Rules tab selected and the rules list displayed.
And the user should see the rules table with the following columns:
* Name
* Status
* Type
* Priority
* Actions
And the rules list should be displayed for the current page (default rows per page).
And pagination should be visible showing:
* Total count of rules
* Current range (e.g., {{1–25 of 50}})
* Rows per page control and next/previous navigation

steps.action: *When* the user navigate to "ESNI Management" page by clicking ESNI Management tab on the home page or from the side bar
steps.result: *Then* the user should land on the ESNI Management "Media ID" page by default

steps.action: *When* the user clicks on the "Rules" tab from the top header
steps.result:
*Then* the user should see the Rules tab selected and the rules list displayed.

*And* the user should see the rules table with the following columns:

* Name
* Status
* Type
* Priority
* Actions

And the rules list should be displayed for the current page (default rows per page).

 And pagination should be visible showing:

* Total count of rules
* Current range (e.g., {{1–25 of 50}})
* Rows per page control and next/previous navigation
